seed_records.title: SSRF prevention in webhook delivery
seed_records.content: Webhook URL validation must block RFC 1918 ranges and link-local addresses. Resolve hostname and validate IP before request. Use dedicated egress proxy for webhook deliveries.

seed_records.title: Adopted ArgoCD for GitOps deployment
seed_records.content: All deployments declarative via GitOps repo. ArgoCD reconciles. Jenkins for CI only.

seed_records.title: Write-through cache with Redis for product catalog
seed_records.content: Write-through cache, catalog updates < 100/day, reads 50K/min. Rejected cache-aside.

query: What security measures do we have for external integrations?
notes: Should match security record despite query using 'external integrations' not 'webhook'

seed_records.title: gRPC keepalive fix for AWS NLB idle timeout
seed_records.content: NLB 350s idle timeout vs gRPC 600s keepalive. Connections silently dropped. Fix: GRPC_KEEPALIVE_TIME_MS=60000.

seed_records.title: Cascading failure post-mortem: checkout flow
seed_records.content: Recommendation service slowdown caused thread pool exhaustion in checkout. Added 500ms timeout, bulkhead pattern, circuit breaker.

seed_records.title: PostgreSQL deadlock fix with canonical lock ordering
seed_records.content: Concurrent transactions acquiring row locks in different order. Fix: lock by table name alphabetically.

query: Have we had reliability issues with AWS networking?
expected_match_titles: gRPC keepalive fix for AWS NLB idle timeout
notes: Cross-domain: query about AWS networking should surface a debugging record

seed_records.title: API v1 sunset timeline
seed_records.content: 12% traffic on v1. Deprecation notices next month, hard shutdown in 6 months. v1 returns 410 Gone. Frees 2 engineers.

seed_records.title: Switched to JWT with short-lived tokens
seed_records.content: Access tokens 15min, refresh tokens 7 days. Stateless validation. Critical ops still check session store.

seed_records.title: JSON Patch (RFC 6902) for settings API
seed_records.content: Using JSON Patch instead of merge patch for user settings. Prevents null vs absent ambiguity. Audit trail of field changes.

query: What are we changing about our API?
notes: Broad query should surface multiple relevant records across domains
